addresses.label: Foundation
addresses.description: Elastos Foundation address. Received 30% of block rewards before CR activation (height 658,930).

addresses.label: DAO Treasury (CR Assets)
addresses.description: Receives 30% of block rewards after CR Committee activation (height 658,930). Funds DAO proposals.

addresses.label: DAO Expenses
addresses.description: Operational budget for the CR Committee. Funded via CRCAppropriation transactions.

addresses.label: Burn Address
addresses.description: Destroyed ELA. Receives CR+DPoS shares during PoW fallback mode. 13M ELA burned in 2022 (CR Proposal #1631).

addresses.label: BPoS Stake Pool
addresses.description: Holds all ELA that has been exchanged for BPoS voting rights via ExchangeVotes (0x62) transactions.

addresses.label: BPoS Reward Accumulation
addresses.description: Receives 35% of block rewards in the BPoS era. Rewards distributed to validators and their stakers.
